info.title: Prisma Cloud CSPM API
info.description: Palo Alto Networks Prisma Cloud Cloud Security Posture Management (CSPM) REST API. Provides programmatic access to manage cloud security posture including alerts, policies, compliance, assets, cloud accounts, and user management.

post.description: Returns a JWT token for accessing the Prisma Cloud APIs. Token is valid for 10 minutes.

get.description: Extends the session timeout for the current JWT token.
Returns a list of alerts that match the specified filters.

post.description: Returns a list of alerts using POST with filter parameters in the body.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of alerts with additional fields.

post.description: Returns a paginated list of alerts using POST.

get.description: Returns alert details for the given alert ID.

BearerToken.description: JWT token obtained from the /login endpoint
